summary: Iteration 267: Preventivi-Fatture Linking Feature Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed via Playwright. Verified: 1) GET /api/preventivi/{id}/linked-documents returns correct structure with documents, imponibile, total_fatturato, total_nc, net_invoiced, remaining, percentage, is_complete, 2) POST /api/preventivi/{id}/link-invoice correctly links invoice with custom amount, 3) DELETE /api/preventivi/{id}/unlink-invoice/{invoice_id} correctly removes link, 4) FT documents add (+) to total_invoiced, NC documents subtract (-), 5) Preventivi list shows stato_fatturazione: completo (green), parziale (orange), non_fatturato, 6) LinkedDocumentsPanel renders in preventivo editor sidebar with FT/NC indicators (+/- signs and colors), 7) Progress bar changes color: green when complete, orange when partial, 8) Invoice list shows 'P' badge when linked to preventivi, 9) Invoice editor shows linked preventivi reference, 10) Link dialog shows available invoices filtered by client, 11) Duplicate link returns 409 error, 12) Link with custom amount works.

issues: Minor React hydration warning for span inside select element - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend linked-documents endpoint correctly calculates net_invoiced = total_fatturato - total_nc
Backend recalc_preventivo_invoiced correctly handles both progressive and manual links
Frontend LinkedDocumentsPanel correctly shows FT with green +amount and NC with red -amount
Frontend InvoicingProgressBar correctly uses green for complete (>=100%), orange for partial (0-100%)
Frontend link dialog correctly filters invoices by client_id
Backend returns 409 for duplicate links (both progressive and manual)
All data-testid attributes present for testing: linked-documents-panel, btn-link-invoice, link-invoice-dialog, linked-doc-*, invoicing-progress, prev-link-badge-*, invoice-linked-prevs
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: prev_50c2da16f2 (100% fatturato), prev_6534e128c9 (FT+NC net=0), prev_4db2a68b44 (20% parziale), inv_4941cb2617c0 (standalone invoice)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preventivi-Fatture linking feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/preventivi/{id}/linked-documents, POST /api/preventivi/{id}/link-invoice, DELETE /api/preventivi/{id}/unlink-invoice/{invoice_id}. Frontend components: LinkedDocumentsPanel in preventivo editor sidebar, InvoicingProgressBar in preventivi list, P badge on invoices list. FT adds to total, NC subtracts. Progress bar: green=complete, orange=partial.

TestLinkedDocumentsEndpoint.test_linked_documents_document_structure: PASS - Each doc has invoice_id, document_number, document_type, amount, sign, issue_date, status, link_type

TestFTAndNCCalculation.test_ft_adds_to_total: PASS - FT documents add to total_fatturato
TestFTAndNCCalculation.test_nc_subtracts_from_total: PASS - NC documents subtract, net_invoiced = total_fatturato - total_nc

TestPreventiviListStatoFatturazione.test_list_shows_stato_fatturazione: PASS - All preventivi have stato_fatturazione field

TestInvoiceListPBadge.test_invoice_list_includes_linked_preven: PASS - Found 10 invoices with P badges

PlaywrightUITests.test_linked_documents_panel: PASS - Panel found in preventivo editor
PlaywrightUITests.test_link_invoice_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with filtered invoices
PlaywrightUITests.test_p_badges_on_invoices: PASS - Found 10 P badges on invoices list
PlaywrightUITests.test_progress_bar_colors: PASS - Green for complete, orange for partial

verified_features.linked_documents_endpoint: VERIFIED - Returns correct structure with all fields
verified_features.link_invoice_endpoint: VERIFIED - Links invoice with custom amount, returns 409 for duplicates
verified_features.unlink_invoice_endpoint: VERIFIED - Removes link and recalculates totals
verified_features.ft_nc_calculation: VERIFIED - FT adds (+), NC subtracts (-) from net_invoiced
verified_features.linked_documents_panel: VERIFIED - Shows FT/NC with +/- indicators and colors
verified_features.progress_bar_colors: VERIFIED - Green for complete (>=100%), orange for partial
verified_features.p_badge_on_invoices: VERIFIED - Shows P badge with count when linked to preventivi
verified_features.linked_prevs_in_invoice: VERIFIED - Invoice editor shows linked preventivi reference
verified_features.link_dialog_client_filter: VERIFIED - Dialog filters invoices by client
